annex-a-8.label: Information for interested parties of AI systems

iso42001-4-1.requirements: Identify internal and external factors relevant to AI system development and use.

iso42001-4-2.requirements: Determine stakeholder requirements and expectations for AI systems.

iso42001-4-3.requirements: Define boundaries and applicability of the AI management system.

iso42001-4-4.requirements: Establish, implement, maintain and improve the AI management system.

iso42001-5-1.requirements: Demonstrate commitment to AI governance through active leadership involvement.

iso42001-5-2.requirements: Establish an AI policy appropriate to organizational purpose and objectives.

iso42001-5-3.requirements: Assign and communicate AI-related roles, responsibilities and authorities.

iso42001-6-1.requirements: Identify and address AI-related risks and opportunities.

iso42001-6-2.requirements: Establish measurable AI objectives and plans to achieve them.

iso42001-6-3.requirements: Plan and manage changes to the AI management system.

iso42001-7-1.requirements: Determine and provide resources needed for AI management.

iso42001-7-2.requirements: Ensure personnel have necessary competence for AI-related activities.

iso42001-7-3.requirements: Ensure awareness of AI policy, roles and system implications.

iso42001-7-4.requirements: Determine internal and external communication requirements for AI.

iso42001-7-5-1.requirements: Include required documented information in the AI management system.

iso42001-7-5-2.requirements: Ensure proper identification, format and review of documentation.

iso42001-7-5-3.requirements: Control availability, distribution and protection of documentation.

iso42001-8-1.requirements: Plan, implement and control processes for AI system operations.

iso42001-8-2.requirements: Conduct risk assessments for AI systems considering impacts and likelihood.

iso42001-8-3.requirements: Select and implement appropriate AI risk treatment options.

iso42001-8-4.requirements: Assess potential impacts of AI systems on individuals and society.

iso42001-9-1.requirements: Monitor, measure, analyze and evaluate AI system performance.

iso42001-9-2-1.requirements: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals.

iso42001-9-2-2.requirements: Plan, establish and maintain an internal audit programme.

iso42001-9-3-1.requirements: Review the AI management system at planned intervals.

iso42001-9-3-2.requirements: Include specified inputs in management reviews.

iso42001-9-3-3.requirements: Document decisions and actions from management reviews.

iso42001-10-1.requirements: Continually improve suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of AI management.

iso42001-10-2.requirements: React to nonconformities and take corrective action.

iso42001-a-2-2.requirements: Define and communicate the organization's AI policy.

iso42001-a-2-3.requirements: Ensure AI policy aligns with other organizational policies.

iso42001-a-2-4.requirements: Review AI policy at defined intervals or upon significant changes.

iso42001-a-3-2.requirements: Define roles and responsibilities for AI system activities.

iso42001-a-3-3.requirements: Establish processes for reporting AI-related concerns.

iso42001-a-4-2.requirements: Document resources required for AI system development and operation.

iso42001-a-4-3.requirements: Manage data resources used in AI systems.

iso42001-a-4-4.requirements: Manage tools used for AI system development and operation.

iso42001-a-4-5.requirements: Manage computing infrastructure for AI systems.

iso42001-a-4-6.requirements: Manage human resources involved in AI activities.

iso42001-a-5-2.requirements: Establish processes for assessing AI system impacts.

iso42001-a-5-4.requirements: Assess impacts on individuals or groups affected by AI systems.

iso42001-a-5-5.requirements: Assess broader societal impacts of AI systems.

iso42001-a-6-1-2.control: Management guidance for AI system development
iso42001-a-6-1-2.requirements: Define objectives for responsible AI system development.

iso42001-a-6-1-3.control: Management guidance for AI system development
iso42001-a-6-1-3.requirements: Establish processes for responsible AI design and development.

iso42001-a-6-2-2.requirements: Define and document AI system requirements and specifications.

iso42001-a-6-2-3.requirements: Document AI system design and development activities.

iso42001-a-6-2-4.requirements: Verify and validate AI systems against requirements.

iso42001-a-6-2-5.requirements: Control deployment of AI systems into production.

iso42001-a-6-2-6.requirements: Monitor AI system operation and performance.

iso42001-a-6-2-7.requirements: Maintain technical documentation for AI systems.

iso42001-a-6-2-8.requirements: Record event logs for AI system activities.

iso42001-a-7-2.requirements: Manage data used for AI system development and enhancement.

iso42001-a-7-3.requirements: Control acquisition of data for AI systems.

iso42001-a-7-4.requirements: Ensure data quality meets AI system requirements.

iso42001-a-7-5.requirements: Track and document data origin and lineage.

iso42001-a-7-6.requirements: Control data preparation processes for AI systems.

iso42001-a-8-2.control: Information for interested parties of AI systems
iso42001-a-8-2.requirements: Provide system documentation and user information.

iso42001-a-8-3.control: Information for interested parties of AI systems
iso42001-a-8-3.requirements: Report externally on AI system activities as required.

iso42001-a-8-4.control: Information for interested parties of AI systems
iso42001-a-8-4.requirements: Communicate AI-related incidents to relevant parties.

iso42001-a-8-5.control: Information for interested parties of AI systems
iso42001-a-8-5.requirements: Provide information to interested parties about AI systems.

iso42001-a-9-2.requirements: Establish processes for responsible AI system use.

iso42001-a-9-3.requirements: Define objectives for responsible use of AI systems.

iso42001-a-9-4.requirements: Document and communicate intended use of AI systems.

iso42001-a-10-3.requirements: Manage suppliers involved in AI system activities.

iso42001-a-10-4.requirements: Manage customer relationships for AI systems.
